Calendar & To-do

SYNC

One link, everything synced: Masterlist / Application Form (Licensing_Master), Client Details, Links, Spiel, Calendar & To-dos, Rookie Challenge, and Admin Activity all sync through this single Web App URL. Setup: click Copy Appscript → in your Google Sheet open Extensions > Apps Script → paste & save → Deploy as Web App (Execute as Me, access: Anyone) → paste the URL above → Save URL → Test Connection. If you deployed an old version, re-deploy via Manage Deployments > Edit > New Version (same URL keeps working). The Form Link opens the application form directly — walang login, fill out lang at Submit. Kung parehong Name at Contact Number ang i-submit ulit, mag-a-update lang ang record (hindi magdodoble). PARA HINDI MAWALA ANG LINK SA IBANG DEVICE: i-click ang Download Auto-Connect Copy — kopya ito ng hub na naka-embed na ang Web App URL at branding sa loob mismo ng file. Iyon ang i-send/i-save sa ibang devices: pagbukas, konektado agad at auto-load ang data, hindi na kailangan mag-paste ng URL kahit kailan. Bonus: kung form link lang ang hawak mo (may ?page=form), pwede mo iyon i-paste sa URL box — automatic aalisin ang ?page=form at magiging Web App URL.

Branding & Theme

Pumili ng preset sa Color Presets (live preview agad), gumamit ng sariling Primary/Accent colors, o i-click ang Auto Colors from Logo para kunin ang colorway mula sa logo mo (automatic din ito pag nag-upload ka ng bagong logo). Tapos i-click ang Apply & Save Branding. Kasama ang branding sa Share Copy at sa public Application Portal. Reset to Default para bumalik sa dating itsura.

User Accounts

Login accounts for this hub. Passwords are stored hashed on this device (not in plain text). At least one account must remain.
Tip: create one account per agent.
